description: Press release news sources for UK theatre cast announcements

sources.name: Sonia Friedman Productions
sources.notes: Wix site. Sitemap has 674+ articles with lastmod dates. URL slugs are descriptive.

sources.name: Cameron Mackintosh Ltd
sources.notes: 29 news articles in sitemap. Previously thought JS-rendered but plain requests works fine.

notes: fetch_type: 'sitemap' — fetch sitemap XML, parse <loc> + <lastmod>. Best for Wix/WordPress with news sitemaps.
fetch_type: 'html_index' — paginate HTML news index, parse article links. Fallback for sites without sitemaps.
production_company — used as metadata on auto-discovered productions from this source.
Add new sources here and upload to S3 — no code changes needed.
